basics.name: Katlego Magoro
basics.title: Software Engineer (Full Stack .NET • Automation • Data Analysis)
basics.address: Unit 302, Elrica Complex, 370 Johan Street, Arcadia, Pretoria, 0083

objective: Full Stack .NET Developer with 3+ years of experience delivering enterprise-grade systems across financial services, engineering, and internal business platforms. Specialized in C#, .NET, SQL Server, API integration, Blazor, test automation, and cloud DevOps pipelines. Strong hybrid capability across full-stack delivery, quality engineering, and data analysis.
summary: Software Engineer with hands-on experience across full-stack .NET delivery, test automation, and data analysis. Builds clean, scalable, production-ready systems using C#, ASP.NET Core, EF Core, SQL Server, Blazor, and modern CI/CD practices. Strong collaborator in agile teams, with consistent ownership of architecture decisions, performance optimization, and high-quality releases.

bullets: Leading full-stack development using C#, .NET 8, ASP.NET Core, Web API, EF Core, SQL Server, and Blazor.
Design and implement scalable RESTful and OData APIs, backend services, and responsive front-end components.
Own architecture decisions, domain modeling, database design, and performance optimization using LINQ and EF Core.
Apply SOLID principles, clean architecture, dependency injection, and layered design patterns for production-ready delivery.
Contribute to CI/CD pipelines, build automation, and release management using Azure DevOps and Git.
Conduct code reviews, mentor junior developers, and troubleshoot complex issues across API, data, and UI layers.

experience.role: Associate Developer — Software and Data Engineering
bullets: Developed full-stack features using C#, .NET, Blazor Server, EF Core, and SQL Server for enterprise reporting and account management platforms.
Took end-to-end ownership of modules including API integrations, database structures, reusable components, and UI improvements.
Improved system performance by optimizing SQL queries and EF Core relationships, reducing load times across key reporting screens.
Integrated Salesforce through ELSA workflows to automate data synchronization and improve internal portal functionality.
Contributed to architecture discussions, implemented CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps, and supported junior developers through reviews.
Led end-to-end QA for financial and retail systems across four African countries, ensuring reliability and compliance.
Built automated regression suites with Selenium (Java), Robot Framework, and Rest Assured.
Integrated automation execution into CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Azure DevOps.
Performed API testing, compatibility testing, and functional validation in agile delivery cycles.

experience.role: Software Developer Trainee — Samsung Innovation Campus
experience.org: Samsung Innovation Campus, in partnership with Walter Sisulu University
bullets: Led a high-impact project analyzing the economic consequences of load shedding in South Africa using Python data tooling.
Built web and mobile applications using Java, Firebase, HTML, and CSS for reporting and presentations.
Designed data-driven application outputs for analytical storytelling and stakeholder communication.
Featured by Samsung South Africa and Samsung Global Youth Day for technology impact and youth innovation.

experience.org: East London Industrial Development Zone (ELIDZ) Science and Technology Park Incubation Program
bullets: Played a key role in a team win at the ELIDZ hackathon, securing prize money and incubation funding.
Applied technical support and data analysis to improve project outcomes and operational efficiency.
Contributed to project documentation and incubation activities focused on community-impact use cases.

projects.name: Loadshedding Impact Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed load-shedding impact on the South African economy using Python pipelines and web-crawled datasets.

projects.name: EKASISKOOL Mobile App
projects.description: Built Android mobile functionality for school-focused use cases with Java and Firebase-backed data flows.

projects.name: EKASI BNB Guesthouse App
projects.description: Created Android app modules supporting guesthouse booking and service workflows.

projects.name: EKASI BNB Online Management System
projects.description: Developed online management system for hospitality operations and booking data management.

projects.name: Website Functionality Testing
projects.description: Implemented automated functional test suites for web workflows and key user journeys.

projects.name: Data Automation Testing
projects.description: Built Robot Framework and Python automation scripts for repeatable validation and regression checks.

projects.name: ELIDZ ICT Hackathon — Team Code Brigaders
projects.description: Won the East London IDZ Science and Technology Park ICT Hackathon Challenge (Nov 2021) as part of Team Code Brigaders, presenting a health application designed to improve the rate at which services are rendered in public clinics in rural areas. The win earned R30,000 and a 12-month incubation place with R100,000 in funding.

projects.name: PAICTA AgriSec Hackathon
projects.description: Led a team at the PAICTA Virtual Eastern Cape Youth Digital AgriSec Hackathon (Sep 2021), coordinating roadblocks, tracking progress, and presenting the team's project to the judging panel. Team placed 2nd out of 20 teams.

education.degree: Advanced Diploma in Information Resource Management (Information Technology)
education.notes: Applied advanced information systems and data management concepts in real-world organisational contexts; strengthened software development through structured analysis, system modelling, and solution design.

education.degree: Diploma in Information and Communication Technology, specialising in Application Development
education.notes: 73% average, with distinctions in 7 of 12 modules.

certifications.name: ISTQB Foundation Level (CTFL)
certifications.issuer: Southern African Software Testing Qualifications Board (SASTQB)

certifications.name: Robot Framework with Python — Selenium/API Automation Testing
Cucumber BDD with Java — Masterclass Selenium Framework
GitHub Ultimate: Master Git and GitHub
JMeter from Scratch on Live Apps — Performance Testing
Job Oriented — Practical Software QA Testing
SQL for Data Analysis: Beginner MySQL Business Intelligence
Samsung Innovation Campus — Basic Coding and Programming

highlights.title: ELIDZ Hackathon Win
highlights.description: Won the East London IDZ Science and Technology Park ICT Hackathon Challenge with Team Code Brigaders (Nov 2021), securing prize money and a year-long incubation place.

highlights.title: Samsung Innovation Campus — International Youth Day Feature
highlights.description: Featured globally by Samsung as part of their International Youth Day Celebration, recognising the Samsung Innovation Campus program's role in developing emerging tech talent.

highlights.title: Hybrid Engineering Profile
highlights.description: Combines full-stack .NET development, automation testing, and data engineering to deliver robust business solutions.

featuredIn.title: ELIDZ STP Hosts a Successful ICT Hackathon Challenge
featuredIn.summary: Official ELIDZ press statement naming Team Code Brigaders (including Katlego) as winners of the November 2021 ICT Hackathon Challenge for a health application aimed at improving service delivery in rural public clinics. Note: the release spells the surname 'Mogoro'.

featuredIn.title: Samsung programme helps fuel the dreams of a young technologist
featuredIn.summary: A personal feature profiling Katlego's journey from a planned law degree into ICT, his Diploma at Walter Sisulu University, and his graduation from the first Samsung Innovation Campus cohort in South Africa.

featuredIn.title: International Youth Day 2023 — Samsung empowers innovators of tomorrow
featuredIn.summary: Global Samsung story featuring youth innovators, including Katlego's profile and development journey.

featuredIn.title: Final-year IT students graduate in AI education thanks to WSU-Samsung partnership
featuredIn.summary: Coverage of the 2024 Samsung Innovation Campus AI graduation ceremony, where Katlego served as the main student representative for the first cohort, addressing new graduates alongside Samsung executives and Minister Stella Ndabeni-Abrahams.

featuredIn.title: Expleo SA Digital Skills Factory celebrates success in partnership with YES programme
featuredIn.summary: National tech media coverage profiling Katlego as a success story of Expleo's Digital Skills Factory initiative, run in partnership with the Youth Employment Service (YES) programme, on his transition into a qualified software developer.
